title: Flutter: Android background foreground service
description: Keep the WebSocket relay connection alive when the app is backgrounded on Android. Requires: (1) Add flutter_foreground_task or similar package to pubspec.yaml, (2) Kotlin ForegroundService class in android/app/src/main/, (3) notification channel for persistent notification, (4) Flutter platform channel to start/stop the service. POST_NOTIFICATIONS and FOREGROUND_SERVICE permissions are already declared in AndroidManifest.xml.
close_reason: Android foreground service implemented: NieForegroundService.kt, MethodChannel in MainActivity, Dart BackgroundService wrapper, integrated with RelayService connect/disconnect
